name: xau_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, simultaneous BB(20,2.0) breaches with RSI(2) extremes revert to the mean within hours when BB width is above its 30th percentile and regime is range-like (low ADX).

entry_rules.long: Close < LowerBB AND RSI(2) < 5 AND bb_width_pct > 30 AND previous bar also below LowerBB or RSI<10 (confirmation)
entry_rules.short: Close > UpperBB AND RSI(2) > 95 AND bb_width_pct > 30

regime_filter.rationale: Mean reversion needs range regime (low ADX) but not dead volatility; exclude trending bursts where bands keep expanding.
